items.title: Apple ordered to cooperate with India antitrust probe as court declines to pause case
items.summary: An Indian court has ordered Apple to cooperate with the country's competition watchdog in an ongoing App Store antitrust case, while declining to pause the proceedings entirely. Here are the details.

items.title: BYD is driving the Song Ultra EV over 2,700 miles to prove its new battery and 5-min charging
items.summary: BYD is going where no EV has gone before to put its new Blade Battery and 5-minute Flash Charging tech to the test. The new Song Ultra EV, equipped with the new tech, will drive over 2,700 miles (4,395 km) across China's largest...

items.title: Costco has a new stackable discount on the 2027 Chevy Bolt
items.summary: Costco Auto Program is back with an exclusive incentive for members on the newly revived 2027 Chevrolet Bolt EV .

items.title: iPhone 18 Pro release date: Here's when Apple's new model is coming
items.summary: Apple's new flagship iPhone 18 Pro and companion models are expected to be unveiled this fall, following the same pattern the company has followed for years. Here's when to expect the iPhone 18 Pro announcement, release date, and details...

items.title: iOS 26.5 adds new setting for alternative app marketplaces in Brazil
items.summary: Apple has added a new setting on iOS 26.5 that lets Brazilian users select their preferred app marketplace other than the App Store. Here are the details.

items.title: Training-Free BLE Beacon Detection of Freight Wagon Direction at Railway Control Points
items.summary: New research proposes a low-infrastructure way to detect whether a freight wagon has entered or exited a station control point using Bluetooth Low Energy RSSI signals. The system uses Eddystone-TLM BLE beacons mounted on wagon bodies and...
